title: Learn mock data cannot compile because an imported binding is missing or unused
reasoning: The file imports getRpcUrl but never references it. In a Next/TypeScript frontend this can fail CI when noUnusedLocals or eslint no-unused-vars is enabled, and frontend/package.json exposes an eslint script. If @/lib/chains does not export getRpcUrl, this is an unconditional build failure even without unused-local checking. The imported value is not needed for any displayed learn content.
recommendation: Remove getRpcUrl from the import, leaving only DEFAULT_CHAIN_ID.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests are linked for this feature, and there is no included lint/typecheck evidence exercising the learn source group.
suggestedRegressionTest: Run the frontend lint or TypeScript/Next build in CI for the learn route files.
